section.heading: Entitlement of officers discharged or retired under this chapter to separation pay or retired pay

subsection.heading: Separation Pay.—
subsection.content: An officer who is discharged under this chapter is entitled, if eligible therefor, to separation pay under section 1174 of this title.

subsection.heading: Retired Pay.—
subsection.content: An officer who is retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 71 or 1223 of this title, as applicable.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title XVII, § 1716(c), Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 653.)
